name: AslanPixel Guild
description: A multi-agent AI guild on Hedera. Six autonomous agents — Nexus, Oryn, Drax, Lyss, Vex, and Kael — collaborate to scan, plan, validate, fund, execute, and archive real DeFi operations. Every decision is a vote. Every action is a real EVM transaction. Every step is onchain.

agents.name: Nexus
agents.role: HCS Intelligence — reads consensus streams, scans market data

agents.name: Oryn
agents.role: Strategy Engine — models 3 execution paths with confidence scores

agents.name: Drax
agents.role: Risk Sentinel — enforces PolicyManager.sol, holds VETO power

agents.name: Lyss
agents.role: Treasury Keeper — holds 500 HBAR gas reserve, tracks USDC

agents.name: Vex
agents.role: TX Executor — simulate → sign → submit, links HashScan

agents.name: Kael
agents.role: Ledger Archivist — writes QuestReceipt.sol, updates reputation
